_comment: Config for tools/seal.py. Copy to engram.config.json next to your repo root (or set ENGRAM_CONFIG). All paths are relative to the repo root. No hardcoded folder names live in seal.py — they all come from here.

seal._comment: The private directory to encrypt at rest, and where its ciphertext lands.

tamper._comment: Tamper-evidence snapshot of your governance/structure notes. structure_lock holds a SHA-256 manifest of every file matched below.

append_only._comment: Optional. An append-only inbox where past entries must never be edited or deleted (only new ones appended). Each entry starts with a heading like '### ID-001'. Leave file empty/omit this block to skip.
